csharpCode: using UnityEngine; using UnityEngine.SceneManagement; public class Script { public static string Main() { var scene = SceneManager.GetActiveScene(); var roots = scene.GetRootGameObjects(); string r = ""; foreach (var go in roots) { r += go.name + " | "; var comps = go.GetComponents<Component>(); foreach (var c in comps) { if (c != null) r += c.GetType().Name + " "; } r += " || "; } return r; } }
